About Plumber4me

Family-run, trusted across Derbyshire & beyond

Your Local Plumbing Experts — Led by Liam

Plumber4me is a proudly family-run plumbing business serving Derbyshire, Nottinghamshire and all surrounding areas. Founded and led by Liam, we've built our reputation on honest work, fair pricing, and showing up when it matters most — including our 24-hour emergency call-out service.

We are Gas Safe Registered, fully insured, and committed to delivering the highest standard of workmanship on every job. Whether it's a leaky tap, a full boiler installation, or an emergency at 2am, we treat every home with the same care and respect.

With over 1,100 Facebook followers and a growing community of satisfied customers across South Normanton, Alfreton, Ripley and beyond, we're proud to be the plumber that local families trust. Get in touch today for a free, no-obligation quote.

Our Services

Comprehensive plumbing solutions for homes and businesses

🔧

General Plumbing Repairs

From leaky taps and dripping pipes to toilet repairs and overflows. We diagnose and fix all common plumbing problems quickly and affordably.

🔥

Boiler Installation & Repair

Gas Safe Registered boiler installations, servicing and repairs. We work with all major brands to keep your home warm and safe year-round.

⚡

24-Hour Emergency Call-Out

Burst pipe at midnight? No heating in freezing temperatures? Our emergency team is available 24/7 to get your problem resolved fast.

🚿

Bathroom Installation

Complete bathroom fitting service from design to installation. We handle everything including plumbing, tiling, and fixtures for your dream bathroom.

🏠

Central Heating Systems

Full central heating installation, repair and maintenance. We ensure your radiators, pipework and controls are working at peak efficiency.

🚰

Drain Unblocking

Blocked sinks, toilets, baths and external drains cleared fast. We use professional equipment to locate and remove stubborn blockages.
